message:
test(core): add proptest coverage for session_store module

21 property-based tests covering:
- Save/load roundtrip for pane, window, session key types
- TTL expiry boundary (readable at ttl-1, gone at ttl+1)
- Key namespace isolation (pane/window/session don't collide)
- Overwrite-last-wins semantics with TTL reset
- Delete idempotency across all key types
- Session ID validation (empty/whitespace rejection)
- Arbitrary operation sequence crash resistance
- Model-checked pane operations vs HashMap reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
